verifierUrl.description: URL of the Spellguard Verifier server

selfUrl.description: URL where this plugin's webhook server listens

agentId.description: This agent's unique identifier in the Spellguard network

codeHash.description: SHA256 hash of the running code

expectedVerifierImageHash.description: SHA384 hash of the expected Verifier image

agentSecret.description: Spellguard agent secret for Verifier registration authentication

managementUrl.description: URL of the Spellguard management server

gatewayPort.description: Port for the local MCP Guard gateway HTTP listener
